steps: Weigh 32 g of LB agar powder. LB Agar, powder (Lennox L agar) Thermo Fisher Catalog #22700025
Add the powder into 1 L 1 of deionized water. Water refers to sterilized deionized water Contributed by users
Autoclave entire bottle of LB media.
